output.summary: 11-layer Int5 model uses EMA, XSA, and causal chunk-wise test-time training to adapt after scoring each validation chunk.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal causal test-time training adapts model weights chunk-by-chunk on validation data immediately after each chunk’s evaluation.
techniques: Int5-All quantization with FP16 embeddings to fit the 11L model under 16MB
EMA plus XSA on final layers with Muon optimizer, SmearGate, and orthogonal init for stable convergence
Causal chunk-wise test-time training: evaluate each chunk, then run SGD epochs on those scored tokens
